_doc: Rift Warden drops (P6-W910). Default entity loot table — resolved from the frozen id eclipse:rift_warden, no code wiring. Mini-boss purse: guaranteed umbral shards, THE Replant book (the custom eclipse:replant enchantment — degrades gracefully while P4 hasn't registered it, storm_cache precedent) and a trophy-ish vanilla rare. The 1x rift_core progression drop (fallback 4 shards) + 2 shards at each participant's feet live in RiftWardenEntity.dropCustomDeathLoot.

entries.name: minecraft:enchanted_book
entries._p4_hook: eclipse:replant is registered by P4; entry degrades gracefully if absent (storm_cache precedent)

entries.name: minecraft:music_disc_otherside
entries._doc: trophy: the song from the other side of the rift
